blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,638 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 14°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 32".
